# PDF Editor | Premium Offline PDF Suite

[![Live App](https://img.shields.io/badge/Live%20App-Online-success?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://asr-ajay.github.io/pdfeditor/)
[![License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC--ND%204.0-lightgrey.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/)

**PDF Editor** is a powerful, professional-grade Progressive Web App (PWA) that provides a comprehensive suite of PDF management tools. Designed with a focus on absolute privacy and high-performance local processing, it allows you to edit, merge, split, and convert PDF documents entirely within your browser—no data ever leaves your device.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### 💎 Professional Interface
- **Office-Style Ribbon**: Familiar and intuitive navigation similar to modern productivity suites.
- **Tabbed Workspace**: Work on multiple PDF documents simultaneously with ease.
- **Glassmorphism Design**: Sleek, modern aesthetics with high-contrast visibility.
- **PWA Enabled**: Install as a native desktop or mobile application for offline use.

### 🛡️ Privacy First
- **100% Client-Side**: All PDF processing (including OCR) happens locally in your browser.
- **Zero Server Uploads**: Your sensitive documents are never transmitted or stored on any server.
- **Secure by Design**: Operates in a sandboxed environment for maximum safety.

### 🛠️ Advanced Toolset
- **PDF Editor**: Edit text, images, and layout directly within the document.
- **Smart Merge**: Combine multiple PDF files into a single, organized document.
- **Precision Split**: Extract specific pages or split large PDFs into multiple files.
- **AI-Powered OCR**: Extract text from scanned documents using high-accuracy Optical Character Recognition.
- **Optimization Suite**: Compress PDFs for smaller file sizes without sacrificing readability.
- **Multi-Format Conversion**: Seamlessly convert PDFs to and from supported formats.

### 🔍 User Experience
- **Global Shortcuts**: Support for standard keyboard shortcuts (Undo/Redo, Save, etc.).
- **Responsive Layout**: Optimized experience across Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile devices.
- **Real-time Preview**: High-fidelity PDF rendering with zoom and navigation controls.

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 19 + TypeScript.
- **Processing**: [pdf-lib](https://pdf-lib.js.org/) & [pdf.js](https://mozilla.github.io/pdf.js/) for high-fidelity manipulation.
- **OCR Engine**: [Tesseract.js](https://tesseract.projectnaptha.com/) for local character recognition.
- **UI & Animations**: Tailwind CSS + Motion (Framer Motion).
- **PWA**: Vite PWA Plugin for offline capabilities and native installation.
